ai_summary: Castrol India Limited and Tata Motors have launched a pilot collaboration to establish a structured system for collecting and recycling used engine oil from Tata Motors' service network, starting in Karnataka. This initiative aims to address a significant environmental challenge by responsibly managing hazardous waste and promoting used oil circularity across the lubricant value chain. The partnership enhances both companies' sustainability profiles and aligns with broader ESG commitments, with no apparent red flags.
